name: Almond Slices (Mondel Schnits)
recipeInstructions: The almonds need not be blanched; just slice them fine. Sift flour and baking powder together and set aside. Cream the eggs and sugar thoroughly. Add the lemon extract and water, then beat hard. Gradually add the sliced nuts and flour, beating lightly until thoroughly mixed. Pour the batter into a greased pan and sprinkle sugar over the top. Bake at 350°F until brown. Allow the cake to cool in the pan before cutting into slices.
